themes.exampleQuote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had.
I just wish this place was bigger, gets packed quickly!
mine was definitely on the sweet side
the workers are so nice every time I visit!
The wi-fi isn't good enough to work from here so I wouldn't come back for that.

notable_quote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had — the coffee, food, and overall cafe vibe is fantastic.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers rally around two specific drinks — the strawberry matcha and the iced tiramisu latte — and consistently mention warm staff, but the small footprint and unreliable wifi draw real friction from anyone hoping to settle in for more than a cup.
quarter_narrative: Twenty-six creators filmed Delanie's Coffee Shadyside this past quarter; Delanie's filmed essentially none of it back. Those 30-plus TikToks accumulated 176,000 plays without a single post from the business's own account, making Delanie's one of the most-documented unstaffed stories in Pittsburgh coffee right now. The tiramisu latte alone traveled far enough to put @tessadecario over 37,000 plays on a single video. Meanwhile, in the broader Pittsburgh Cafes family, Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange is leading this issue on social momentum — a signal Delanie's is generating for other people but not yet converting into its own standing. The rank climbs when the business starts showing up in the conversation it's already starring in.
tldr_read: Creator-driven TikTok reach in the tens of thousands, Instagram nearly dormant at 3 posts in 30 days and zero reels — Ones to Watch, #4 in Pittsburgh Coffee Shops.
tldr_meaning: The external filming signal is unusually strong for a business at this rank, but Instagram momentum sits just at the family median and TikTok presence is nonexistent on the business side, meaning the current trajectory depends entirely on creators continuing to show up.

playbook.headline: Claim the TikTok account before someone else defines it
playbook.action: 26 creators have already done the work — one business-side account with reposted creator videos stops the signal leak immediately.

playbook.headline: Turn the tiramisu latte into a repeating visual
playbook.action: Instagram sits at 3 posts in 30 days and zero reels; a weekly reel built around the drink that already has 37,200 organic plays is the lowest-effort path to closing that gap.

playbook.headline: Tag the creators who are already regulars
playbook.action: With 26 unique creators on file this quarter, a simple story reshare or comment acknowledgment builds the kind of repeat coverage that compounds rank quarter over quarter.
